headline: DraftKings rises on Senate's sports events, prediction markets bill
summary: Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland takes a look at some of Monday morning's trending tickers and stories. US senators have introduced a bipartisan bill to ban sports betting from prediction markets. DraftKings (DKNG) stock is moving higher on the news. Synopsys (SNPS) stock is rising on a Wall Street Journal report that Elliott Investment Management has built a multibillion-dollar stake in the company. Elon Musk's Tesla (TSLA) and SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) are teaming up to build a large chip complex in Texas.
